title: region — product analytics

events.name: Region Created
events.description: New Region row created. `source` explains the entry point (tenant_provisioning / admin_created / legacy_backfill_command).

events.name: Region Default Changed
events.description: The default flag flipped. Feeds the compliance dashboard — default changes are audit-critical.

events.name: Region Tax Config Updated
events.description: `changed_fields_count` only + `rate_delta` (numeric change in default_rate_percent). Full field names + registration_number are financial-tier + NEVER Segment properties.

events.name: Region Paused
events.description: has_expected_resume_at is boolean — signals whether the pause is scheduled or open-ended.

events.name: Region Resumed
events.description: Distribution of pause durations feeds the ops-readiness dashboard.

events.name: Region Archived
events.description: had_inbound_rows is boolean — signals whether the caller used --force to bypass the FK check.

events.name: Region Quota Exceeded
events.description: Attempt to create a Region beyond the region_slot cap. Feeds the upsell funnel — Small-tier tenants hitting the 1-region cap are prime Medium upgrade candidates.

events.name: Country Defaults Consulted
events.description: surface: admin_ui_create / admin_ui_edit / platform_admin_lookup. Signals which countries the tenant admin UI has to render defaults for most often.

events.name: Default Region Auto-Healed
events.description: heal_action: promote_oldest / re-seed / demote_extras. drift_kind: zero_default / multiple_default. Fed by ReconcileDefaultRegionInvariantJob.

notes: Region.tax_config.registration_number is confidential-tier — it is never a Segment property.
region_id is ULID (`reg_*`) — an anonymised identifier. No PII risk.
`identify` calls do not happen in this module. Only `track` events.
